summary: The implementation successfully addresses both requirements. The diff shows that complete event details (event type, date, location, number of guests, style, contact number) have been added to both the OrganizerBookingCard and GuestBookingList components using the useGetEvent hook to fetch event data. The implementation includes proper formatting with icons matching the EventList component pattern, responsive design with styled containers, loading states, and error handling. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
